item.title: Exploiting Polkit (CVE-2021-3560): Race Condition to Root
item.description:
This writeup demonstrates how a race condition in Polkit (CVE-2021-3560) can be exploited to achieve root privileges on Linux systems.

The vulnerability abuses improper handling of D-Bus authentication requests, allowing an unprivileged user to be treated as UID 0 (root). :contentReference[oaicite:0]{index=0}

👉 Read full article here: https://eternull.medium.com/exploiting-polkit-cve-2021-3560-a-race-condition-to-root-on-linux-6d6d6d028dce

This writeup demonstrates how a race condition in Polkit (CVE-2021-3560) can be exploited to achieve root privileges on Linux systems.

The vulnerability abuses improper handling of D-Bus authentication requests, allowing an unprivileged user to be treated as UID 0 (root). :contentReference[oaicite:0]{index=0}
